I will check slice 0 for cell type annotations and display the counts for each cell type present.

```python
slice_0 = session.get_slice(0)

if slice_0.has_celltype():
    cell_types = slice_0.adata.obs['celltype'].value_counts()
    print("Cell types present in slice 0:")
    print(cell_types.to_string())
else:
    print("No cell type annotations are available for slice 0.")
